title: Horizon's New Dawn
description: Vanilla-like modpack, featuring better graphics, camera, a new dimension, and much more!
body:
This modpack contains many mods, but most of them being optimization mods or vanilla-style mods.

Enjoy a full adventure in new biomes, a new dimension and new things to do! but keeping minecraft style!

Use shaders for better graphics.

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WZ3HlhgG0Vs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WZ3HlhgG0Vs)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check out the creators of the mods, each and every one has put a ton of work into making the mods.
